failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out with CatalogServiceTimeoutError: catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms, preventing retrieval of product evidence needed to answer the question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent understood the user goal and followed the required plan: search available Electric Kettles sorted by ascending price. The tool invocation arguments were well-formed. The first failure occurs when ProductCatalogSearch returns an explicit timeout error from the catalog-service dependency. This is an infrastructure/connectivity failure, not an invalid invocation, guardrail block, or reasoning error. The failure was not resolved later; the agent could only report task failure.
